title: Reconcile Duplicate Registry And Contract Declarations
summary: Collapses avoidable duplicated schema, validator, and registry declarations where one authority surface should remain canonical.
scope_items: Identify duplicate authority declarations between shared core and the active plan pack that survived migration-era cutovers.
Collapse duplication where one canonical owner should remain and document the bounded cases that still require mirrored declarations.
done_when_items: Avoidable duplicated declarations are removed from the highest-value contract surfaces.
Any intentional duplication is documented with a concrete authority reason.
